## Validation

<!-- List the commands and manual checks you ran. -->

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` (or explain why it is not applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated documentation for user-facing or configuration changes.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, private workspace data, or generated artifacts.
- [ ] I considered security and backward-compatibility impact.
